segments.speaker: 题目4/5
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. How do you like living an apartment? Well, it's definitely different from last year in the dorms. I have a kitchen now so I can cook my own meals. That must be nice. Yeah, kind of. My roommate and I aren't very good at cooking. We downloaded some apps to try to improve our skills, but it's been a bit overwhelming trying to find apps we want to use. You wouldn't believe how many are out there. Oh, interesting. I've never used anything like that. My mom is a professional chef at a restaurant.
